scripts.start: cross-env NODE_ENV=production npx prisma migrate deploy && cross-env NODE_ENV=production node index.js
scripts.dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development npx prisma generate && nodemon -L --env-file ./.env.development index.js
scripts.test: cross-env NODE_ENV=test DATABASE_URL="postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5433/zappwa_test" npx prisma generate && cross-env NODE_ENV=test DATABASE_URL="postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5433/zappwa_test" npx prisma migrate deploy && cross-env NODE_ENV=test DATABASE_URL="postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5433/zappwa_test" jest --detectOpenHandles --forceExit
